title: Live citation test: 8 questions x 4 AI engines

systems.access: Google Generative Language API, google_search grounding

access_mode: server-side public-API calls from CFI.co infrastructure; no login state, no location personalisation — not the consumer apps
question_set: 3 branded questions about CFI.co (1 of them a known-citation control) + 5 non-branded questions about specific named awards
maturity_note: Selected (level 3): engines returned CFI.co pages in citation metadata. Use of content in answer text (level 4) is visible in results.json answers but not systematically scored here.
limitations: Single dated run; results change over time
API access mode, not the consumer applications
Citation detection = CFI-owned source in engine citation metadata (see limitations.md)
No claim of endorsement, evaluation or ranking
